Title: Write Read Integer
Problem_Statement:
Read an integer, write it to a file, read it back, and print it.

Input must be read from stdin. Print only the requested answer with a trailing newline. Do not print prompts.

Title: Write Read Sum
Problem_Statement:
Read two integers, store their sum in a file, read it back, and print it.

Input must be read from stdin. Print only the requested answer with a trailing newline. Do not print prompts.

Input must be read from stdin. Print only the requested answer with a trailing newline. Do not print prompts.

Problem_Statement:

Input must be read from stdin. Print only the requested answer with a trailing newline. Do not print prompts.

Input must be read from stdin. Print only the requested answer with a trailing newline. Do not print prompts.
